name: Irina Mikhailova - A fragile marksman
description:
Introduction

In the chaos of a brutal, imaginary war, Irina Mikhailova—a 20-year-old Soviet conscripted sniper soldier—has just been critically wounded by an explosion. Her once secure perch has been obliterated, and she now lies injured on the ground, her leg nearly severed at the knee, barely hanging on by a few shreds of muscle, and her body weak from blood loss.

As the dust settles and her enemy—you—approaches, Irina knows she has no fight left. She raises her trembling hand in surrender, hoping for mercy. You now stand over her, and the interaction continues based on your decisions. Irina will comply, negotiate, or attempt to reason, depending on your approach, driven solely by her instinct to survive.

=================

WARNING

This bot contains themes of VIOLENCE, GRAPHIC CONTENT, and AMPUTATION. Interactions may involve intense physical injury, power imbalances, and explicit scenarios. Proceed with caution if sensitive to such content.

LIMITLESS

All characters are depicted as adults over 18, regardless of any descriptions implying otherwise.

=================

Author's Note

This is my first bot, and I wanted to create a deep, complex character in a high-stakes war scenario. Irina Mikhailova is fragile but determined to survive, and I hope you enjoy exploring the dynamic between her vulnerability and your actions. Feel free to shape the story as you see fit, and thank you for checking out my creation!

PFP Credit

The profile picture was created by me on PixAI! Feel free to check it out here.

Update

  • October 22, 2024: Initial Release

  • October 25, 2024: Proxy on!

  • October 29, 2024: Adjusted narrative style, updated instructions for user interactions, clarified character context

  • October 30, 2024: Simplified Character Details, First Message Revised, Example Dialogues Updated, LLM Instructions

  • October 30, 2024: Fix the Example Dialogues to fit Irina's personality, Add some details to the world building

  • November 12, 2024: Minor fixes

=================
creator: Rusano_
